vesi_yoga: There is a planet other than Moon in the 2nd house from Sun
You will have a balanced outlook. You are truthful, tall and sluggish. You will be happy and comfortable even with little wealth.
nipuna_yoga: Sun and Mercury are together (in one sign).

You will be intelligent and skillful in all works. You will be well known, respected and happy.\n This yoga is the most powerful in divisional charts like D-10. In rasi chart also, it can give results if Mercury is not combust.
maalavya_yoga: Venus is in a quadrant in own sign or exaltation sign.
You are a great person of watery nature. You emit a lustre akin to moonlight. You enjoy tasty food. You have luxuries. You have excellent health. You are well-versed in arts.
paasa_yoga: The seven planets occupy exactly 5 distinct signs among them.

One born with this yoga has the risk of being imprisoned. This person is capable in their work. This person is talkataive. This person has many servants. This person lacks character. Paasa means a noose.
guru_mangala_yoga: If Jupiter and Mars are together or in the 7th house from each other, then this yoga is present.
One born with this yoga is righteous and energetic. The person's 'energies are channelled in dharmic paths.
mridanga_yoga: If (1) there are planets in own and exaltation signs in quadrants and trines and (2) lagna lord is strong, then this yoga is present.
One born with this yoga is a king or an equal and is happy. Mridanga is a rich and elegant percussion instrument popular in south India.
kalpadruma_yoga: Consider (1) lagna lord, (2) his dispositor, (3) the latter’s dispositor in rasi and (4) in navamsa. If all the four planets are all in quadrants, trines or exaltation signs of both rasi and navamsa, then this yoga is present.

One born with this yoga becomes a king. Person likes wars. Person is very prosperous, principled, strong and kind. Kalpadruma is a celestial tree of the heaven. This yoga is also known as Paarijaata yoga. Paarijaata is a celestial flower.
bhaarathi_yoga: If the lord of the sign occupied in navamsa by 2nd, 5th or 11th lord exalted and joins the 9th lord, then this yoga is present.
One born with this yoga is a great scholar. Person is intelligent, religious, good-looking and famous. Bhaarathi is another name of Saraswathi, the goddess of learning.
vimala_yoga: If the 12th lord occupies the 12th house, then this yoga is present.
One born with this yoga is noble, frugal, happy and independent. Vimala means pure.
vanchana_chora_bheethi_yoga: The Lord of Lagna is in the 6th, 8th, or 12th house joined with or aspected by malefics.
You will face constant fear of being cheated, defrauded, or robbed by others.
dharidhra_yoga: The lord of the 11th house is in the 6th, 8th, or 12th house.
You may face financial struggles, heavy debts, and difficulty in accumulating wealth despite hard work.
dharidhra_yoga_149: Lord of Lagna associated with 6th, 8th, or 12th lord and subjected to malefic aspects.
Yoga causes dire poverty, financial straits, wretchedness and miseries
dharidhra_yoga_152: Natural malefics (not owning 9th or 10th) in Lagna associated with or aspected by maraka lords (L2/L7).
Yoga causes dire poverty, financial straits, wretchedness and miseries
sareera_soukhya_yoga: The Lagna lord, Jupiter, or Venus is placed in a Kendra house.
You will enjoy excellent physical health, a long life, and luxury.
rogagrastha_yoga: The Lagna lord is in the 6th, 8th, or 12th house and is associated with the lord of the 6th.
You may have a weak constitution and be prone to chronic health issues or frequent illnesses.
dehasthoulya_yoga_116: Lagna in a watery sign joined by benefics OR Lagna Lord is a watery planet.
You will have a stout, heavy, or corpulent body (tendency toward obesity).
sada_sanchara_yoga: The Lagna lord or the Moon is in a movable sign (Chara Rashi).
You will be constantly on the move, traveling frequently for work or personal reasons.
swaveeryaddhana_yoga: The Lagna lord is the strongest planet in the chart and is placed in a Kendra, associated with the 2nd lord.
You will earn wealth solely through your own efforts, hard work, and personal prowess, without much ancestral help.
anthya_vayasi_dhana_yoga: The lords of the 2nd, 9th, and 11th houses are placed in the 12th, 6th, or 8th houses from each other but associated with benefics.
You will accumulate and enjoy great wealth and prosperity during the later years or the final stage of your life.
matrumooladdhana_yoga: The 2nd lord is associated with the 4th lord or placed in the 4th house with strong benefic influence.
You will inherit or gain wealth and assets through your mother or from your maternal side of the family.
asatyavadi_yoga: The 2nd lord is associated with malefic planets (Saturn, Rahu, Ketu) and Mercury is weak.
You may have a tendency to speak untruths or have a habit of lying.
sumukha_yoga: Benefic planets (Jupiter, Venus) are placed in or aspecting the 2nd house.
You will have an attractive facial appearance and a peaceful temperament.
durmukha_yoga: Malefic planets (Saturn, Rahu, Ketu) occupy the 2nd house.
You may have a facial defect or an expression characterized by anger.
vishaprayoga_yoga: The 2nd lord is associated with the 6th, 8th, or 12th lords and is aspected by malefics.
You may be subject to poisoning by others or face health complications due to toxic substances.
bhratruvriddhi_yoga: The 3rd lord or Mars is associated with a benefic planet or placed in a benefic sign/Navamsha.
You will have an increase in the number of brothers and sisters, and enjoy a harmonious relationship with them.
yuddha_praveena_yoga: The lord of the Navamsa occupied by the 3rd lord's Navamsa lord is placed in its own Varga.
The person becomes a capable strategist and an expert in warfare and tactical combat.
bandhubhisthyaktha_yoga: 195. The 4th lord must be associated with malefics or occupy evil shashtiamsas or join inimical or debilitation signs.
The person will be clesertedby his relatives.
matrunasa_yoga_198: 198 - The Moon should be hemmed in between, associated with or aspected by evil planets.
The person's mother will have a very early death.
matru_sneha_yoga: First Variation - The Lagna (1st house) and the 4th house have the same planetary ruler. The lst and 4th houses can have common lords only in respect of Ge/Vi (Me) or Sg/Pi (Ju). Second Variation - The lords of the 1st and 4th houses are either natural or temporal friends. Third Variation - The Lagna lord (1st house ruler) and the 4th house lord are aspected by benefics.
Cordial relations will prevail between mother and son.
anapathya_yoga: Jupiter and the lords of Lagna, the 7th and the 5th are weak
The person will have no children.
eka_puthra_yoga: 225 - Lord of 5th house should join a kendra or trikona.
The person will have only one child.
satkalatra_yoga: 239 - The lord of the 7th or Venus should join or be aspected by Jupiter or Mercury.
The native's wife will be noble and virtuous.
mathibhramana_yoga_variation: This yoga occurs, per B.V.Raman Variations, if - (1) The 6th is occupied by Rahu and aspected by Kethu. (2) The 6th lord is further affiicted by conjunction with Mars. (3) The planet of nerves Mercury is in a common sign in conjunction with two malefics, Mars and Sun. (4) In the Navamsa again Mercury occupies the 6th with Rahu and the 6th lord is in conjunction with Mars.

vipareetha_raja_yoga: The 6th, 8th and 12th houses are known as trik sthanas or dusthanas (bad houses). If their lords occupies dusthanas or conjoin dusthanas, it results in this yoga.
One having this yoga experiences tremedous success, typically after an initial struggle. Vipareeta means extreme.

doshas.Kala Sarpa Dosha: There is no Kala Sarpa Dosha in this horoscope.
doshas.Manglik Dosha:
According to Vedic Astrology, When Mars occupies the 2nd house, 4th house, 7th house, 8th house, or 12th house, from Ascendant (1st house), Moon, and Venus in the birth chart or horoscope, the cosmic alignment creates Manglik Dosha. South Indian astrology considers Mars in the 2nd House for Mangal Dosha. It is called Chevvai (Sevvai) Dosham in Tamil.

The 2nd is the House denoting family and joy, and placement of Mars here can make the native devoid of mercy, and contribute to poverty and strains in marital life. At times, this can end up in breakups too.

Though there is Mars dosha- due to following exceptions- Mars dosha is ineffective.

Mars is in association or aspected by Jupiter or Saturn

When Mars is in own house, uccham or in friend's' house leads to reduced effects

Since Mars cojoins with Jupiter or moon, it reduces the dosha

When Jupiter or Venus is in Lagna it reduces dosha
doshas.Pitru Dosha:
Pitru Dosha is a planetary flaw that means a karmic debt of the ancestors, which is to be paid by the person afflicted with Pitru Dosha in the Kundli. It is formed when your forefathers have committed any mistakes, crimes, or sins in their life journey. In return, you have to pay the karmic debt by experiencing different challenges or punishments in your life. This Dosha is created when Sun or Moon are in conjunction or aspects Rahu or Ketu in your birth chart. The malefic effects of this Dosha become severe when the conjunction takes place in the 1st, 5th, 8th, or 9th house of the birth chart. Hence, if you are facing never-ending troubles, Pitru Dosha may be the reason for the pain and agony in your life.
There is pitru dosha in this horoscope for the following reasons:

Either sun, moon or Rahu is in ninth house.

Either sun, moon, rahu or ketu has been afflicted by malefic planets like Mars or Saturn
